titleStmt.title: SII 27.109: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 109. (A.R. No. 312 of 1931-32.) HĀLĀḌI, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab standing in the Narasiṁhadēva temple in the hamlet Ratnagiri.
This slightly damaged record registers a gift of lands to god Lakshmīnarasiṁhadēva of Ratnagiri in Kala-nāḍu by Aṇṇa-bhaṇḍāri of the Uḍuva family when Chaṇḍapa was governing Bārakūru-rājya.
It is dated Śaka 1356 (current), Pramādi, Bhādrapada śu. 11, Wednesday corresponding to 1433 A.D., August 26.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī lakṣumī narasiṁhāyanamaḥ namōbrahmaṇyadēvāya gōbrāhmaṇa hitāya
ca jagadhitāya kruṣṇāya śrī gōviṁdāyēti śāsanaṁ svastiśrī jayūbhyudaye da
śakavaruṣa 1356 neya vartamūna pramūthi saṁvatsarada bhādrapada su 11 bu lu śrīma
nmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara vīrapratāpa dēvarāyaru vijayanagariya
siṁhāsanadalu sakalarājyavanū sukhadiṁ pratipālisuva kāladalū A rāya
ra nirūpadiṁ bārakūra rājyavanū caṁḍapagaḷū Aḷuva kāladalū kalanāḍa Oḷagaṇa ra
tnagiriya śrī lakṣmi nārasihyadēvarige Uḍuvara baḷiya Aṁṇa bhaṁḍāri tānū badda brahmadā
yada mūlada dēvara beṭṭu dhāreyaneṟadu koṭṭa bāḷina catusēmeya vivara mūḍalu
hariva hoḷeyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu harida bacaliṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu
nārasiṁhadēvara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu sūla nuḍeya
daṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīmeyoḷaguḷa bayalu nāgaṁḍugalu bittuva bedegaṇagilu
mū 8 meke makki bittuva bedegaṇagilu nāgaṁḍu mū 32 Ubhaya bayalu meke makki
saha bittuva bedegaṇagilu nāgaṁḍugadalū mū ḷaṁ dalli Uḷamakki maranekki niḍilu nidhinikṣēpa
jalapāśāṇa Akṣiṇi Agāmi sidasādhya vēnuḷa Aṣṭabhōga tējasvāṁmya sahita śrilakṣmīnara
sihyadēvarige dānadhārāpūrvvakavāgi dhāreyaneṟadu koṭṭanu yī bāḷige teṟu
va teṟu dēva he ḍage teṁka kuḍiyūḍi saṁghamaryādali Oṁdu hoṁnamo
ḷate tettu sukhadiṁ bāḷuviri Eṁdu Oḍaṁbaḍiṁ koṭu barasida silāśāsa
na �yo śāsana pramūṇina bāḷikeyanū Alli bāḷisi koḍuvaṁ tāgi A
Uḍuvara baḷiyali dahana taṁma kōṭiyaṁṇa dahana daṟa pa
lakṣmīnarasihyadēvara nirūpadiṁ A bhaṭṭaru Aṁṇu bha
ṁḍāriya kayyalu tāu dēvarige dhāreya neṟasikoṁḍa dēvara na bhūmi
yanū
damaged
Aṁṇagaḷu rigi da
Aṁṇagaḷa maga ma
dēvariṁda Ada naḍava Akkiya kiyanu dēvara vinayō
damaged
Digital edition of SII 27.109 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
